data.body:
## Description

**What**: Remove ticket_find_open_children from ticket-lib.sh and its tests from test-ticket-health-guards.sh.

**Caller audit**: Confirmed ticket_find_open_children is only called from ticket-transition.sh (replaced in Task 4). No other callers exist in the codebase (verified via grep across all files).

**Test changes**: Remove Test 2 (test_ticket_find_open_children_lists_children) from test-ticket-health-guards.sh. The equivalent functionality is now covered by test_batch_close_finds_open_children in test_ticket_unblock.py (Task 1).

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh (remove function)
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-health-guards.sh (remove Test 2)

### TDD Requirement
TDD exemption: criterion 1 (no conditional logic added) + criterion 3 (removing dead code and its stale tests). The removed function's behavior is fully covered by batch_close_operations tests (Task 1).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ticket_find_open_children function removed from ticket-lib.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ticket_find_open_children' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh
- [ ] Test 2 removed from test-ticket-health-guards.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'test_ticket_find_open_children' tests/scripts/test-ticket-health-guards.sh
